name: Muwaffaq Salti AB
description: Muwaffaq Salti Air Base (MSAB), Azraq, Jordan. Primary AFCENT forward operating location for F-16 deployment in the Levant. Named after Jordanian pilot Muwaffaq Salti. Key US partner force training and regional contingency hub. ICAO: OJAI.
note: Boundary is approximate box — no OSM aerodrome way available. Could be improved with satellite tracing.
